channel.title: Products on 深圳百陈服装有限公司 | Bettzen
channel.description: Recent content in Products on 深圳百陈服装有限公司 | Bettzen

item.title: Wholesale Designer Skirt | 3D Embossed Cupro with Metallic Sheen
item.description:
Item No.: 26031802

Description
#

A statement piece defined by luxury and craftsmanship. Crafted from premium cupro fabric that boasts a subtle metallic sheen and fluid drape. The asymmetric hem (shorter in front) is elevated with intricate 3D embossed floral details, creating a dynamic and artistic silhouette in a sophisticated burgundy hue.

Ideal for: Designer boutiques and stores looking for unique, special-occasion pieces.

item.title: Wholesale Women‘s Cargo Pants | Dual-Zipper & Drawstring Slim Fit
item.description:
Item No.: 26031805

Description
#

Cargo pants redefined with a contemporary, slimming fit. Made from a structured yet breathable functional fabric that holds its shape. Features functional dual side zippers and an adjustable drawstring at waist and hem for a customizable look. The tailored silhouette is both stylish and flattering.

Ideal for: Streetwear and casual fashion boutiques.

Colors: Navy, White
Sizes: S, M, L

item.title: Wholesale Women‘s Linen Viscose Set | Waistcoat & Wide Leg Pants
item.description:
Item No.: 26031801

Description
#

A versatile set that transitions seamlessly from office to casual wear. Made from a custom linen-viscose blend, garment-washed for a soft, drapey, and wrinkle-resistant finish. The waistcoat can be styled separately, paired with the sleek, figure-flattering wide-leg trousers. Fully lined with lightweight cotton for added comfort.

Ideal for: Boutiques and buyers seeking high-quality, coordinated separates.

item.title: Wholesale Women‘s Utility Jacket | Corduroy Collar Cotton Twill
item.description:
Item No.: 26031804

Description
#

A timeless utility jacket updated with a vintage touch. Constructed from durable cotton twill, it features a distinctive contrasting corduroy stand-collar and practical multi-pocket design. Its versatile, unisex-friendly style makes it a perfect layering piece for spring and autumn collections.

Ideal for: Stores targeting customers who appreciate functional fashion with a retro edge.
